title: pelargonium × knipeae
intro: Pelargonium × knipeae, also known as Red Form or Knipe's rose geranium, is a hybrid plant belonging to the family Geraniaceae, derived from the cross between Pelargonium tomentosum and Pelargonium frutens. The leaves and flowers of this plant possess medicinal properties, particularly high in essential oils, which have been used for their antibacterial, antiviral, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × knipeae include its ability to ease anxiety and stress, improve digestion, and support skin health. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in tea, essential oil, and tincture forms, and are often used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine.
